assertions.text: Expands the request into Korean + English keywords (email/이메일/mail/smtp/notification) for searching
Greps the local simon-stack INDEX.md first (offline) before surfacing external skills
Returns a ranked recommendation list where each item gives name, why-it-matched, and how-to-invoke

cases.prompt: Is there a skill for merging PDFs?

assertions.text: Searches both catalogs: local INDEX.md via Grep and the external awesome-claude-skills README via WebFetch with a filtered prompt
Prefers an installed local skill (+2 ranking bonus) and only surfaces external skills when no local equivalent exists
